title: CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER - 211info
text: PORTLAND CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full range of clinical services for children with developmental disabilities or other special health care needs. Specialists and clinical services are available in autism, pediatric psychology and behavioral treatment, child development, cleft lip and palate, developmental evaluation, feeding and swallowing disorders, and communication disorders including speech therapy. Specialized pediatric diagnostic and treatment services for brain anomalies, hemophilia, spina bifida, and down syndrome. 700 SW Campus Drive Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (503) 494-8362 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (503) 494-8362 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or eligibility . Physician referral required. FEES: Accepts OHP (Open Card or prior authorization through a referral from a primary care provider), private insurance, and Medicare. Financial assistance may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located within the Institute on Development & Disability at OHSU. Some staff work in other locations around the state. Services: Autism Therapy Behavioral Learning Therapy * Adolescents Behavioral Learning Therapy * Children Cleft Lip/Palate Clinics Pediatric Feeding Disorders Programs Pediatrics * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Specialized Pediatric Evaluation Speech Therapy If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND
